race.description: Taree Gbota Supporters 5th Grade Heat 3 H
race.comment: BECKY BELLE (8) was safely held last time out, finishing fifth at this track over 300m behind Mako Beast (18.20) in a Grade 5. Placed at her previous run. Ready to return to form. TRALEE DIGBY (4) was prominent throughout when winning two back but could manage only midfield last time when 4th and beaten 6 lengths at Gunnedah (25.60). Has ability and can atone. KODA MULWEE (3) finds it hard to win but looks close to breaking through. Finished second (17.61) at this track last time making it three minors on end. Yet to win out of this box but has been in the placings three times from three starts. Ready to find winning form. LADY REIGN (1) comes back from a let-up as a top three prospect.

runners.name: Bargain Betty
runners.owners: Bears Lodge Racing - Mgr K Ulrick
